Description: The Naval Air Systems Command (NAVAIR) has awarded a Firm Fixed Price Modification for Low Rate Initial Production (LRIP) Lots 6 and 7. The modification to Contract N00019-19-C-0008 was awarded 10 February 2026. The modification was not awarded competitively. The modification was awarded in accordance with the statutory authority permitting other than full and open competition, title 10 U.S.C. 2304(c)(1), as implemented by Federal Acquisition Regulation 6.302-1, which states that only one responsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements.

Title: Product Support Forecasting Tool
Awardee: KNEXUS RESEARCH LLC Vienna VA 22182 USA
Description: Army Contracting Command – Rock Island (ACC-RI) issued the Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace (TSM) long-term, open call on 31 October 2022 for new and novel technology solutions to support the DoD in advancing research, development, prototyping, and adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning (ML), digital and data analytics capabilities. This initiative is governed by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office (CDAO). The TSM solicits, collects, assesses, and curates AI/ML, digital and data analytics solutions, and makes those solutions available through rapid acquisition methods DoD-wide. The TSM serves Government laboratories, industry and academic organizations, and individual developers by providing a forum to showcase their relevant research, products, and services to prospective Government customers, and serves Department of Defense (DoD) by providing a forum to access AI/ML, digital and data analytics solutions and rapidly ingest game-changing technology solutions. The TSM is a digital environment of competed video pitches. The video solutions housed within the marketplace have been assessed and vetted through competitive procedures which conform to the competition requirements of 10 U.S.C. 3026, 3458, 4021 and 4022, Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR)/Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS) Part 35, and Class Deviation 2022-O0007, implementing Section 803 of the Fiscal Year (FY) 2022 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), and thus are readily available to be viewed, selected, and awarded by DoD activities.

Title: Notice of Intent to Sole Source to Rescue One Inc.
Awardee: RESCUE ONE TRAINING FOR LIFE INC Gaithersburg MD 20879 USA
Description: The Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), Office of Acquisition (FA) intends to award a Sole Source Firm Fixed Price Purchase Order to Rescue One Training for Life, Inc., Address: 7621 Rickenbacker Drive, Suite 700, Gaithersburg, MD 20879-4788, UEI: JWRKJ1SX6SK3, with the Period of Performance of: April 8, 2026, to December 31, 2026. This notice of intent is not a request for competitive quotations. In accordance with the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) 6.302-1, the Limited Source Documentation is attached with this notice. As this is not a request for competitive quotes, the government encourages all interested parties who believe they can provide the service to contact Ana Villanueva via email at Ana.M.Villanueva@dea.gov by Friday, April 10, 2025 by 10:00AM, EST and reference number D-26-HRF-0005 and submit a written response describing their ability to provide the services. A determination by the Government not to compete this proposed contract acquisition based upon responses to the notice is solely within the discretion of the Government. Information received will normally be considered solely for the purpose of determining whether to conduct a competitive procurement. This notice does not obligate the Government to award a contract or otherwise pay for the information provided in response. The Government reserves the right to use information provided by respondents for any purpose deemed necessary and legally appropriate. Respondents are advised that the Government is under no obligation to acknowledge receipt of the information received or provide feedback to respondents with respect to any information submitted.
